title: impatiens nicolsoniana
intro: Impatiens nicolsoniana, also known as the balsam or jewelweed, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin irritations such as eczema, acne, and insect bites due to its high content of beta-sitosterol and ursolic acid. The health benefits of Impatiens nicolsoniana include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin conditions and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin issues and promote overall well-being.
